title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the value on the slider, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ slider circles do not return to default middle position after using Reset EQ button
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust one or more EQ slider values (e.g., 100Hz, 1kHz, 10kHz) to non-default positions
Observe the position of all EQ slider circles
expected: After tapping Reset EQ, all EQ slider circles return to the default center (middle) position.
